release_notes: V14.44 build 202 OTA alarm safety patch: blocks firmware installation while a care alarm is active, including low, urgent low, high, urgent high and no-data alarms; disables/hides the install action when OTA is unsafe, re-checks alarm state during download and before OTA finalization, aborts partial OTA safely without reboot when an alarm becomes active, and preserves the build 201 sensor SAGE fix plus the build 200 WiFi, Nightscout, trend buffer, 1-hour mini-trend, IOB, COB, SAGE widget, audio alarm and header alternation logic.
